title: premna macrophylla
intro: Premna macrophylla, also known as the large-leaved Premna or Khas, is a tropical plant species belonging to the family Lamiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities, which are attributed to its essential oils and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Premna macrophylla include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds, as well as its potential to aid in digestive problems and skin conditions. Premna macrophylla can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
